svg.text: mechanical · electrical · chemical · osmotic · from materials in any environment
— · — THE WATER WHEEL — PRIMARY MECHANICAL POWER — · —
water falls onto TOP of wheel
axle drives millstone, pump, or bellows
build from: wood + river + axle + millstones
3 blades: best balance of torque and speed
tower height: above turbulence — taller = steadier wind
or: axle → pump → water storage = gravity battery
500–3,000 m² surface area per gram of charcoal
enormous surface area = large charge storage
ARK OF COVENANT: outer gold + acacia + inner gold + charcoal = supercapacitor
— · — OSMOTIC POWER — ELECTRICITY FROM SALINITY GRADIENT — · —
ions move from high to low
— · — THE ENERGY SEQUENCE — GENERATE → STORE → USE — · —
1. Build water wheel first — most reliable, continuous, highest power
2. Add wind turbine — operates when water is unavailable or insufficient
3. Add osmotic membrane at coastal/estuarine site — supplementary continuous source
see Plate 10 for generator construction · see Plate 9 for audio playback using stored energy
